about.title: About Zoned
about.description: 200 structured workouts, 9 calculators, 8 training plans, 16 collections and 12 articles — all free, no account, no tracking. Zoned makes zone-based training accessible to every runner.

personal.title: Who am I
personal.bio: Runner and developer, I created Zoned to make structured zone-based training accessible to everyone — for free, with no account and no tracking. Every workout, calculator and plan is grounded in training science (Seiler, Billat, Daniels).

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.contributions: This project is open source and available on GitLab. Contributions are welcome!

vibeCoded.title: Vibe Coded
vibeCoded.claude: Developed with Claude Code and Anthropic's Opus 4.5 model
vibeCoded.human: Guided and verified by a human developer
vibeCoded.experience: A 'vibe coding' experience where AI assists creation

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.noServer: No data is sent to any server
privacy.localStorage: Everything is stored locally in your browser (localStorage)
privacy.analytics: No invasive tracking (just anonymized Vercel Analytics)

quiz.title: Quick Quiz
quiz.subtitle: Find your ideal workout in 3 questions
quiz.resultsHint: Based on your answers, here are the workouts that match your needs
quiz.resultsHintApprox: No exact duration match, here are the closest workouts
quiz.noResults: No workouts exactly match your criteria. Try changing your answers.
quiz.goalHint: Choose what best matches your needs
quiz.timeQuestion: How much time do you have?
quiz.environmentHint: The environment available for your training

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Try reloading the page.

zonePersonalization.ctaMessage: Personalize your zones to see your paces

zoneCalculator.title: Zone Calculator
zoneCalculator.description: Enter your max HR and/or VMA to display your personalized zones
zoneCalculator.invalidFcMax: Max HR must be between 100 and 250 bpm
zoneCalculator.invalidVma: VMA must be between 8 and 30 km/h

paceCalculator.title: Pace Calculator
paceCalculator.description: Estimate your race times based on your VMA
paceCalculator.noVma: Enter your VMA to display time estimates

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.noServer: No personal data is sent to any server
privacy.localStorage: All your data stays in your browser (localStorage)
privacy.analytics: Vercel Analytics only measures page views anonymously (no cookies, no identification)

data.title: Your data
data.description: Export or restore your data (favorites, plans, zones, settings)
data.importSuccess: Data restored successfully. The page will reload.
data.invalidFile: Invalid file. Use a file exported by Zoned.
data.confirmDescription: This will replace all your current data (favorites, plans, settings) with the backup file.

learn.title: Learn
learn.description: Guides and articles to improve your running
learn.zonesCtaText: Ready to personalize your training zones?

calculateurs.title: Calculators
calculateurs.description: All the calculation tools for your training

donate.title: Support the project
donate.description: Zoned is 100% free and open source. If you find the app useful, you can support its development.

privacy.localData: Your data stays on your device

storageWarning.title: Your data is stored locally
storageWarning.description: Zoned uses no server. Your favorites, plans and settings are saved only in your browser.
storageWarning.warning: If you clear your browser cache, all your data will be lost.

collections.title: Collections
collections.subtitle: Themed workout paths for every goal
